description: Your CRM contains duplicate company records for the same real-world account identified during a routine data audit. One of the duplicate records contains an internal note indicating which should serve as the primary (canonical) record. Consolidate the two Meridian accounts by identifying the primary record through its internal notes, moving all 5 contacts and 3 opportunities to that primary record, and archiving the duplicate. On the primary record, post a consolidation note and remove the 'Requires-Deduplication' tag. Additionally, tag the 3 consolidated opportunities with 'Account-Deduped'. Login with admin/admin at http://localhost:8069
